title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer exposing Ollama models as LLM, Chat, and Embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI): themes, code highlighting, multi-model chats.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android support; offers synchronous and asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, and manage local models from Ruby scripts and Rails apps.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built Go CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for quick pulls, lists, and prompts from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client for Ollama with async IEnumerables and strongly-typed request/response models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama server and CLI for reproducible deployments on macOS and Linux.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial but actively maintained Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Official Elixir library wrapping Ollama with GenServer behavior for fault-tolerant LLM calls.

title: ollama-php
summary: Community PHP SDK for Ollama with Laravel service provider and PSR-18 HTTP client auto-discovery.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Experimental Zig client for Ollama demonstrating std.http and async streaming with minimal dependencies.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that proxies channel mentions to a local Ollama instance using Socket-Mode.
